response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Tool submitted successfully! We'll review it soon."}

submitted_payload.name: Ralph Workflow
submitted_payload.notes: Free and open-source composable loop framework and AI orchestrator for developers who want a structured workflow instead of a chat session. Works with Claude Code, Codex CLI, and other agent CLIs, ending in a bounded diff and review surface instead of a confident summary.

shared_findings_used: market_intelligence_latest.json: reuse canonical positioning and Codeberg-first story
channel_discovery.json: ToolShelf had a live public /api/submit surface worth verifying instead of drafting more siloed outreach
backlink_status_latest.json: only one live third-party listing verified, so another high-relevance directory backlink is still high leverage
why_this_action: Codeberg adoption is flat, Reddit is structurally weak, and ToolShelf is a relevant AI coding/dev-tools directory with a live unauthenticated submission API that can point traffic directly at the primary Codeberg repo.

summary: added toolshelf.dev to validated autonomous submit hosts after live HTTP 200 submission confirmation
added a regression test so future channel discovery runs do not misclassify ToolShelf as login-blocked

measurement_window.submission_review_window: ToolShelf review queue; check backlink/indexing within 7-14 days
measurement_window.success_signal: live ToolShelf listing linking to the Codeberg primary repo
